title: CAPXEL for E-Commerce | CAPXEL
content: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceTurn Anonymous Traffic Into RevenueCAPXEL gives e-commerce brands the intelligence edge — capture every visitor, understand every buyer, and target with intent data that converts.Talk to Our TeamSee All ProductsThe iceberg is real: most signal is hidden beneath the surface.The E-Commerce ChallengeRising CAC. Wasted Spend. Anonymous Traffic.Paid acquisition is more expensive than ever — but most shoppers still bounce without converting. The old way is broken: retarget pixel audiences, guess at demographics, and hope the algorithm finds the right buyer.The realityMost of the signal that drives conversion happens beneath the surface.CAPXEL is a white-glove data consultancy — we give your marketing team the intelligence layer to identify, understand, and activate the buyers you can't see.How CAPXEL Solves ItFour products. One outcome: convert more of the traffic you already paid for.SPYBOXCapture ~75% of anonymous visitors with full identity data — so you can retarget with precision and stop paying twice for the same attention.Explore SPYBOX INSPEXUnderstand what makes your best customers tick — then find more of them. Build true avatars from 500+ data points per identity.Explore INSPEX Buyer Ambition DataTarget people actively searching for your products this week — client-specific intent data delivered fresh on a 7-day cycle.Explore Buyer Ambition Data ASOMake sure AI agents recommend your brand when shoppers ask. CAPXEL authored the LLM-LD standard.Explore ASO Results That CompoundWhen you can see who's browsing and who's ready to buy, your spend stops leaking.0xROAS improvementClients have seen 3x ROAS improvement.0xprospect acquisitionClients have seen 8x prospect acquisition.The shiftStop optimizing for clicks. Start optimizing for buyers — with an intelligence layer built for the agentic era.White-Glove Data ConsultancySee what's invisible to your competitorsConvert more of the shoppers you already paid to acquire — with identity intelligence and intent data that actually moves revenue.See what's invisible to your competitorsExplore SPYBOXFAQE-commerce teams ask us these questions before they start.How does CAPXEL identify anonymous shoppers?Can I use the data in Meta and Google?What makes Buyer Ambition Data different for e-commerce?Why does ASO matter for e-commerce brands?
